89:
(-Note from Baut-)<Emphasis>Dear <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>,
The time has come to bid you my final farewell. Try as I might to focus on the present, the past still haunts me—my family calls. If you can find it within you to grant me one last favor, I bid you deliver my head to the Allied forces. I have enclosed instructions to this end.</Emphasis>
